name: Vampire Retainer
name_jp: ヴァンパイアの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>眷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>属</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Special Summoned: You can pay 500 LP; add 1 "Vampire" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. If this card is in your GY: You can send 1 "Vampire" card from your hand or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Vampire Retainer" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Special Summoned: You can pay 500 LP; add 1 "Vampire" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. If this card is in your GY: You can send 1 "Vampire" card from your hand or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Vampire Retainer" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Special Summoned: You can pay 500 LP; add 1 "Vampire" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. If this card is in your GY: You can send 1 "Vampire" card from your hand or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Vampire Retainer" once per turn.

sets.set: Speed Duel GX: Duelists of Shadows

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
